gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/365)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/365)
text: سَأَلَ الْعَلَاءُ بْنُ كَامِلٍ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ أَنَا حَاضِرٌ عَنِ الْجِرِّيِّ فَقَالَ وَجَدْنَا فِي كِتَابِ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) أَشْيَاءَ مُحَرَّمَةً مِنَ السَّمَكِ فَلَا تَقْرَبْهَا ثُمَّ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَا لَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ قِشْرٌ مِنَ السَّمَكِ فَلَا تَقْرَبَنَّهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hannan Bin Sudeyr who said,

‘Al-Aa’la Bin Kamil asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> and I was present, about the catfish. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘We<sup>asws</sup> found in the Book of Ali<sup>asws</sup>, Forbidden things from the fish, therefore do not go near these’. Then Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘What does not happen to have scales for it, from the fishes, so do not go near it’.
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hanan ibn Sadir who has said the following: “Al-‘Ala’ ibn Kamil asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, when I was present, about eel. He (the Imam) said, ‘We have found in the book of Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, of fish certain varities are unlawful for food so do not go close to them.’ Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, then said, ‘Of fish those which have no scales, do not go close to them.’”
